## Description
Describe the changes introduced by this PR and the engineering rationale behind them.

Related Issue: # (link to issue if applicable)

## Type of Change
Please check the options that are relevant:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactoring / Code Quality (improving code structure, PEP 8, types)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation (adding or editing docs/README)
- [ ] 🎨 Visuals & Style (CSS adjustments, animations)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:
* **Command**: `python -m pytest tests/`
* **Outputs**: Paste relevant terminal test passing lines or coverage results here.

## Checklist
Before submitting, please verify:
- [ ] My code follows the PEP 8 style guidelines.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or lint errors.
- [ ] All 9 unit tests pass successfully.
